title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Interoperability
intent: Ensure 10_interoperability/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Cross-system integration, protocol adapters, and bridge logic.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 10_interoperability/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 10_interoperability/
All module references resolve to existing paths
All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
SoT scorecard shows PASS for all defined rules
